content: An ultra-wide 360-degree equirectangular panoramic view of a futuristic contemporary art gallery exhibition about artificial intelligence, designed for immersive VR viewing. The scene is inside a vast dark-ceilinged museum hall with exposed rigging, many small spotlights, polished reflective concrete floors, and curved white exhibition walls wrapping continuously across the panorama. The environment is filled with {argument name="visitor count" default="about 25"} adult visitors in smart casual and business attire, standing in small conversational groups and scattered around the room, with subtle face blur or indistinct facial detail. At the exact center of the panorama is a circular installation platform containing a tall translucent holographic human figure made of white glowing particles and vertical strands of light, suspended beneath a large circular ceiling ring. On the left side, show a white robotic arm sculpture on a round pedestal in front of a giant wall artwork depicting a luminous side-profile human head composed of particles and constellation-like dots. Across the walls, include 6 visible AI-themed artworks total: 1 giant particle head mural, 3 framed cosmic nebula or galaxy images, 1 large monochrome abstract painting, and 1 tall colorful starfield-like digital piece in the far right background. On the right foreground, place a large transparent cube installation containing a swirling spiral galaxy projection in blue, violet, and white. Also include 2 small white service robots near the center-right area of the floor. Lighting is cinematic and cool-toned, with blue, purple, and white glows from the installations contrasting against the dark ceiling and neutral gallery architecture. The mood is sleek, high-end, intellectual, and techno-cultural, like an AI biennale or premium digital art fair. Render photorealistically with crisp architectural detail, realistic reflections, natural human scale, and full seamless 360 panorama distortion appropriate for an equirectangular image.
title: 360 AI Art Gallery Panorama
description: A photorealistic immersive 360-degree museum panorama showing a futuristic AI-themed exhibition, ideal for VR scenes, virtual tours, or concept visualization.

content: A bright, cheerful 2D side-scrolling platform game scene in a polished cartoon style, showing a cute white blob-like mascot character standing on a grassy dirt platform in the lower left foreground. The character is tiny and round with a smooth white body, stubby feet, big glossy black eyes with white highlights, and a small smiling mouth, facing slightly right. The environment is a futuristic fantasy landscape under a vivid blue sky with large soft white clouds. Across the scene are exactly 5 floating rectangular hover platforms with rounded corners, white tops, orange undersides, and glowing cyan light panels on the front; one is low near the character, one is center-low, one is center-middle, one is upper-right-middle, and one is top-right. Above the middle of the scene is an arc of exactly 5 glowing ring collectibles, alternating orange and cyan, with small sparkles and tiny white particle dots tracing the jump path between them. The level includes exactly 3 visible grassy ground platforms made of lush green turf over brown soil with rounded cutaway edges: one at far left foreground, one at lower center-left where the character stands, and one at far right foreground. In the background, add rolling green hills, atmospheric blue mountains, and a whimsical futuristic city with smooth white towers and domed buildings accented with cyan-blue windows. Include exactly 3 floating islands with grass tops and small dome structures: one mid-left, one mid-right, and one tiny distant island near the right side. Decorate the foreground with small flowers and bushes. Use saturated colors, clean vector-like outlines, soft lighting, gentle bloom around glowing objects, and a playful mobile-game aesthetic reminiscent of a friendly sci-fi platformer splash screen. Wide cinematic composition, side view, no UI, no text.
title: Cute Futuristic Platformer Scene
description: This prompt generates a vibrant side-scrolling game-like illustration with a cute mascot, floating platforms, and a whimsical sci-fi landscape for use in splash art, concept art, or promotional visuals.

content: A highly detailed anime-style smartphone lock screen wallpaper in a vertical 9:16 composition, themed entirely in sparkling pink idol aesthetics. The scene features {argument name="character name" default="Akari"}, a cheerful teenage magical-idol girl with very long voluminous {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"} twin-tail hair, bright green eyes, fair skin, and a playful expressive face. She wears an ornate frilly stage costume in layered pink, lavender, and white with gold trim, ribbons, heart motifs, lace cuffs, a choker bow, star earrings, and floral heart hair accessories. The background is a dreamy glitter-filled pink haze with bokeh, sparkles, and soft glow effects. Design it as a fake phone lock screen with a large white lock icon near the top center, cellular status icons in the upper right, and the date in Japanese reading 5月22日 木曜日 above a large glowing time display reading {argument name="time display" default="22:22"}. Include 5 visible character depictions of the same girl: 1 large central half-body figure winking and holding one finger to her lips in a teasing pose, 1 upper-left bust portrait laughing with eyes closed, 1 upper-right full or three-quarter body pose joyfully raising a small wand or key-like object, 1 lower-left smaller figure partly obscured by a blurred pink rectangle over the face while reaching outward, and 1 lower-right crouching figure with another blurred pink rectangle over the face while interacting with a large physical lock. Add handwritten Japanese sound-effect style text around the figures, including playful exclamations and notes. Show 2 message notification banners styled like iPhone alerts, both from メッセージ and お兄ちゃん with the text 今どこ〜？, one tilted on the left and one upright on the right. Across the lower middle, place a rounded translucent slider bar with Japanese text スライドでロック解除 and a lock icon. Make the unlocking concept literal by attaching an oversized brass padlock and latch mechanism to the slider, with the lower-right character appearing to unlock it using a key; add nearby handwritten Japanese text suggesting lock removal and a metallic click sound. In the lower left, include 2 circular utility icons, a flashlight and a trash can, plus a comic-style speech bubble reading ポイッ！. Add a camera icon in a dark circular button at the lower right and a thin white home indicator at the very bottom. Render everything with polished glossy anime illustration quality, soft lighting, dense sparkles, layered transparency, and a cute mischievous mood, as if an idol character has taken over and physically prevented the phone from being unlocked.
title: Pink Idol Anime Lock Screen
description: A glittery anime-style smartphone lock screen wallpaper featuring a pink-haired idol girl in five playful poses with notifications, UI elements, and a literal lock-unlocking gag.

content: A photorealistic macOS desktop screenshot of a machine learning engineer’s workspace at night, shown straight-on with a dark blue macOS menu bar and the dock visible along the bottom. The desktop contains exactly 2 main application windows side by side. On the left, a large Visual Studio Code window in dark theme occupies about two-thirds of the screen. The VS Code project is named "VISIONCLASSIFIER" in the Explorer sidebar, with a realistic Python ML folder tree including exactly 11 visible top-level or expanded items: .venv, data, raw, processed, images, notebooks, src, utils, config.yaml, requirements.txt, README.md. Inside notebooks, show exactly 2 visible files: 01_data_exploration.ipynb and 02_model_training.ipynb. Inside src, show a realistic ML code structure with dataset.py, transforms.py, models, resnet.py, train, engine.py, trainer.py, utils.py. The editor area has exactly 4 tabs open: trainer.py, engine.py, resnet.py, config.yaml. The active tab is trainer.py. Display clean, believable Python training code for a ResNet image classification pipeline, including a class Trainer, methods train(self) and train_epoch(self, epoch: int) -> Dict[str, float], references to self.cfg.training.epochs, train_metrics, val_metrics, scheduler.step, save_checkpoint, self.model.train(), batch["image"], batch["label"], optimizer.zero_grad, criterion, loss.backward, optimizer.step, accuracy(outputs, targets, topk=(1,))[0]. Make the code sharp but naturally screen-like, with line numbers visible around lines 24 to 52. At the bottom of the VS Code window, the integrated terminal is open on the TERMINAL tab and shows realistic training logs for exactly 4 epochs in view: Epoch 12/50, Epoch 13/50, Epoch 14/50, Epoch 15/50, each with train and val lines listing Loss, Acc@1, and Acc@5, plus a final line saying a new best checkpoint was saved. Keep the numbers plausible for a successful training run, with top-1 accuracy around 0.88 to 0.91 and top-5 around 0.97 to 0.98. Include the usual VS Code status bar along the bottom with Python environment details. On the right, place exactly 1 dark-themed web browser window showing a local dashboard at localhost:8000 with the page title "VisionClassifier | Dashboard" and the app header "VisionClassifier" plus subtitle "Image Classification Model". The dashboard contains exactly 3 stacked sections. The first section is "Model Overview" with exactly 4 metric cards: Top-1 Accuracy 91.23%, Top-5 Accuracy 98.30%, Total Parameters 23.51M, Model ResNet-50. The second section is "Recent Training" with a dark line chart of accuracy over 50 epochs, showing exactly 2 colored curves labeled Train (Top-1) and Val (Top-1), both rising quickly and stabilizing around the low 90s. The third section is "Confusion Matrix" showing a 10x10 heatmap with a bright diagonal and axes labeled True Label and Predicted Label. Use subtle reflections, crisp typography, realistic UI spacing, and believable screen glow. The macOS top menu bar should show common menus like Code, File, Edit, Selection, View, Go, Run, Terminal, Window, Help on the left and system icons with the time reading Tue May 13 9:41 AM on the right. The dock should contain many recognizable app icons and feel authentic but not distracting. Overall style: ultra-realistic screenshot, professional developer workstation, polished dark mode interfaces, no stylization, no illustration, indistinguishable from a real screen capture.
title: Photoreal ML Developer Desktop
description: This generates a highly realistic macOS screenshot of a programmer training a Python image-classification model in VS Code with a live browser dashboard, useful for product mockups, social posts, and AI demo visuals.

content: Create a clean minimalist static ad on an off-white light gray studio background with a centered editorial layout. At the top, place a large luxury-fashion-style serif headline in black reading {argument name="headline text" default="Stop gambling with your ad spend."}, with the word "gambling" set in italic serif for emphasis. In the middle, show a vintage metal slot-machine window viewed straight on, slightly weathered and realistic, with 3 vertical reels inside a rectangular steel housing and a lever with a black knob on the right side. The 3 reels must display, from left to right, "$", "$", and "?". Make the rightmost reel background pale pink while the first 2 reels are aged white. Add a hand-drawn neon-pink annotation style over the image: 1 arrow-and-note on the left pointing to the first reel reading {argument name="left annotation" default="your attribution"}, 1 starburst scribble above the pink question-mark reel, 1 arrow from the question-mark reel to a circled note on the right reading {argument name="right annotation" default="actual revenue"}, and 1 large curved arrow in the lower left pointing toward the body copy area. Below the slot machine, center a short sans-serif paragraph in black reading {argument name="body text" default="See which campaigns drive revenue, not just clicks. Connect Meta, Google, and Stripe in 60 seconds."}. At the bottom center, place a simple black analytics-style bar logo icon followed by the bold sans-serif brand name {argument name="brand name" default="Humblytics"}. Use strong text fidelity, polished product-ad composition, soft studio shadows, restrained palette of black, steel gray, off-white, and hot pink, and a modern direct-response ad aesthetic.
title: Minimal Slot Machine Attribution Ad
description: This prompt generates a polished static marketing ad with a vintage slot machine metaphor, handwritten annotations, and strong centered typography for analytics or attribution software promotions.

content: Create a bold static SaaS ad on a matte black background with a premium editorial look and highly accurate typography. At the top, place a large stacked serif headline in off-white reading: "Your analytics stack" on the first line, "shouldn’t cost more" on the second line in bright magenta italic serif, and "than your rent." on the third line in off-white serif. Center the composition around a large curled, crumpled receipt made of white thermal paper, angled slightly from upper left to lower right, with visible paper texture, soft shadows, and rolled ends on both the upper right and lower left. On the receipt, show exactly 5 line items in black monospaced or receipt-style text aligned in two columns: "GA4" with "$0", "Hotjar" with "$99", "Optimizely" with "$2,450", "GTM setup (dev hours)" with "$1,800", and "Tag manager debug" with "$400". Highlight the word "Optimizely" with a jagged magenta starburst sticker behind it. Add a dashed divider line below the items, then a bold "TOTAL" label on the lower left of the receipt. On the lower right of the receipt, place a large price reading "{argument name="monthly price" default="$19/mo"}" in heavy black type, circled with 2 hand-drawn magenta marker loops. Add 3 handwritten magenta annotation elements: on the left side, the words "{argument name="left annotation" default="one tool"}" in brush script with an underline and a curved arrow pointing to the receipt; near the bottom center, a curved magenta arrow pointing upward toward the circled price; and at the bottom right, the handwritten tagline "{argument name="tagline text" default="One script. One price."}" with an underline. In the bottom-right corner, add a small block of white sans-serif body copy, right-aligned, reading "{argument name="body copy" default="Analytics, heatmaps, A/B testing, and revenue attribution."}". Use an editorial ad-photography style with crisp text placement, clean hierarchy, high contrast, subtle paper realism, and a limited palette of black, white, and hot pink.
title: Editorial SaaS Receipt Ad
description: This prompt generates a high-contrast startup advertisement featuring a crumpled receipt, bold editorial typography, and pink handwritten callouts for analytics pricing campaigns.

content: Create a minimalist static SaaS ad on a warm off-white background with elegant editorial typography and clean, high-fidelity text rendering. At the top, place a large black serif headline in two lines reading: "{argument name="headline text" default="Your dev team shouldn’t be your analytics team."}" The words “dev team” should appear in italic serif while the rest remains bold high-contrast serif, with generous spacing and a luxury magazine-style layout. Centered below, show a slightly tilted white paper invoice sheet with a soft drop shadow and a subtle vertical fold crease down the middle, as if photographed from above. The invoice uses black monospaced typewriter-style text and reads exactly: “INVOICE — DEV HOURS, OCTOBER” as the header, then 5 line items with hours and prices aligned in columns: “A/B test setup on pricing page   8 hrs   $1,200”, “GTM tag install (3 events)   4 hrs   $600”, “Funnel tracking debug   6 hrs   $900”, “Meta pixel mapping   3 hrs   $450”, and “Attribution reporting build   12 hrs   $1,800”. Under the 5 items, add a dashed divider line, then a bold monospaced “TOTAL” on the lower left and the total price “$4,950” on the lower right. Draw a hand-drawn yellow line striking through the total price. Add 4 doodle-style annotation elements around the invoice: on the left, handwritten yellow text saying “every month??” with a yellow arrow pointing right toward the paper; on the upper right of the paper, a yellow starburst scribble; below the total, a green curved arrow pointing up toward the crossed-out price; and on the lower right, a green hand-drawn circle containing the handwritten words “zero devs,” connected to the green arrow. At the bottom center of the ad, add a smaller black sans-serif body copy in 2 lines reading: “{argument name="body text" default="Marketers ship tests and track revenue themselves.\nNo tickets. No tag manager. One script."}" Keep the composition airy, premium, and conversion-focused, blending modern startup ad design with tactile paper realism and playful marker annotations.
title: Minimal SaaS Ad With Invoice Mockup
description: This prompt generates a premium static marketing ad featuring a developer-hours invoice, strong editorial typography, and hand-drawn annotations for SaaS landing pages or paid social creatives.

content: Create a premium minimalist keynote-style presentation cover slide in an Apple-inspired industrial design aesthetic. Use a wide 16:9 layout with a deep matte black upper background and a pale concrete-gray lower platform occupying the bottom quarter of the frame. Place a large photorealistic floating rectangular slab in the right-center foreground, resembling a thin black glass device or polished obsidian platform with mirror-like reflections, chamfered chrome-metal edges, and precise industrial finishing. The slab should hover above the light surface and cast a soft elongated shadow directly beneath it. Add a tall vertical gray metallic wall or pillar on the far right edge to frame the composition. Use extremely sparse, high-end art direction, lots of negative space, cinematic studio lighting, subtle gradients, and crisp contrast between black and silver materials. On the left side, set clean white sans-serif typography with a clear hierarchy: a tiny top caption reading "{argument name="system label" default="Apple-inspired presentation system"}", a very large bold headline reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Clarity At Scale"}", and a medium subtitle reading "{argument name="subtitle text" default="The strongest slides behave like products."}". Below that, include exactly 3 numbered principles in a vertical list with thin separators and refined spacing: "01 | {argument name="principle 1" default="One focal object"}", "02 | Binary light / dark rhythm", and "03 | Blue only for signal". Add a short thin horizontal rule above the list and a tiny blue accent line below the list. Draw a very fine horizontal guide line near the top spanning most of the slide, with the small page number "01" at the upper right. Repeat the small caption "Apple-inspired presentation system" once again at the bottom left on the light surface. Overall look: luxury tech presentation, editorial product-launch slide, ultra-clean Swiss grid, restrained monochrome palette with only one subtle blue accent, photorealistic rendering blended with presentation design.
title: Apple-Style Minimal Presentation Cover
description: This prompt generates a sleek Apple-inspired presentation title slide with editorial typography and a floating black-glass product object, ideal for keynote covers, pitch decks, and design system presentations.

content: Create a clean modern Chinese tech blog cover in a wide 16:9 layout with a soft light-gray background, rounded-corner canvas, and minimalist dashboard aesthetic. On the left, place a small rounded category pill near the top with a yellow dot icon and the text “VPS 实测 · 购买参考”. Below it, set a very large bold dark navy Chinese headline in two stacked lines: “DMIT涨价之后” and “我把搬瓦工”. Under the headline, add a short yellow underline accent and then a medium-gray subheading reading “先看重点再下单”. The typography should feel premium, editorial, and highly legible, with strong contrast and generous spacing. On the right, show a floating desktop-app style server monitoring panel with a white card body, subtle shadow, rounded corners, and a pale beige browser top bar with three small circular window buttons. The panel header should read “BandwagonHost – CN2 GIA”, with a smaller line underneath “洛杉矶 · CN2 GIA” and a green status label “运行中”, plus on the top-right a small clock icon and the text “运行时长 27 天”. Inside the panel, include exactly 5 metric cards across the top row labeled “CPU” showing “12%”, “内存” showing “28%”, “硬盘” showing “18%”, “带宽” showing “1.2 Mbps”, and “延迟（本地）” showing “156 ms”, each with a small teal icon and a thin teal progress bar. Below, place a large line chart card on the left titled “稳定性（近 7 天）” with a top-right annotation “可用性 99.92%”, a teal fluctuating line, a vertical scale from 97% to 100%, and date labels from “05-13” through “05-19”. To the right of the chart, add a specs card titled “配置摘要” listing exactly 5 rows: “CPU 2 vCPU”, “内存 2 GB”, “硬盘 40 GB SSD”, “流量 1 TB/月”, and “系统 CentOS 7.9 64bit”. In the lower-left area overlapping between the text block and the dashboard, add a smaller white recommendation card with rounded corners and shadow. Its title line should include a yellow bookmark icon and read “购买参考 · 重点看这几项”. Inside, list exactly 4 rows: “线路质量  CN2 GIA”, “稳定性  ★★★★☆”, “性价比  中上”, and “适用场景  建站 / 中转 / 轻应用”. Add soft decorative elements in the background: a pale mint abstract rounded shape in the bottom-left corner, a faint dotted mint pattern above it, and a light dotted curved connector line arcing from the left text area toward the top of the dashboard, with a small yellow dot on the curve. Place a small rounded yellow name tag in the bottom-right corner of the canvas with the text “小墨同学”. Use a restrained palette of dark navy, teal, yellow, white, and light gray, with crisp vector-style rendering, subtle shadows, spacious composition, and a polished AI-generated editorial cover look for a VPS comparison article.
title: Chinese VPS Comparison Cover
description: A polished wide-format Chinese tech article cover featuring a bold headline, a server monitoring dashboard, and recommendation cards for VPS comparison content.

content: A highly realistic vertical smartphone screenshot of a Chinese livestream app showing a cozy college dorm room streamer scene. The interface should look like a real iPhone screen capture with status bar at the top, including Chinese carrier text, time 9:16, and battery around 67%. In the upper left, show a circular cartoon avatar and a livestream info badge with the streamer name "叮当猫", age "18岁", and the line "直播中 | 10.2万人在看". Add small app icons in the upper right for chat/menu and close. The main scene is a young female college student sitting at a desk, facing the phone camera and waving with one hand. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. She has shoulder-length dark hair and wears large black-and-pink over-ear gaming headphones and a white hoodie with a small cute cat illustration on the chest. She is livestreaming from a tidy, warmly lit dorm bedroom. Behind her is a light-colored loft bed with a safety rail and cream bedding printed with bears and stars, plus a ladder with colorful rungs in orange, green, and blue. Under and beside the loft bed are shelves and a wardrobe area with hanging clothes in pale tones and one bright yellow hoodie. The shelves contain upright books, small plush toys, bottles, and personal items. A ring light is visible on the right edge of the frame. On the desk in front of her, place a smartphone in a clamp stand, a black desktop microphone with a subtle red accent on a mini tripod, open notebooks and papers, stacked textbooks, cosmetics including lipstick and brushes, a clear water bottle, a small black rectangular box, and warm fairy lights scattered across the tabletop. The lighting should feel soft, domestic, and inviting, with realistic indoor shadows and a slight phone-camera look. Overlay exactly 7 floating live chat comments stacked on the lower left in dark translucent rounded boxes with cyan name tags. The comments read, from top to bottom: "弹幕： 主播好可爱！", "弹幕： 叮当猫加油！", "弹幕： 10万+人了！🎉", "弹幕猫： 我也在这个大学", "弹幕： 求同款耳机", "弹幕： 支持主播，爱你💕", "弹幕： 欢迎新人！". At the bottom, include a dark comment input bar with placeholder text "说点什么..." and a row of livestream action icons. On the lower right, add a vertical like area with the label "点赞", a red count bubble showing "9.8万", and a large pink heart button. Overall style: photorealistic Chinese social media livestream screenshot, believable app UI, detailed dorm environment, cute youthful campus streamer aesthetic, natural composition, crisp text rendering, no extra panels.

At the upper right, add a dark rounded popularity pill reading 10万+, a close X icon, a purple button labeled 更多直播, and a gift progress card reading 礼物展馆 0/24 with a blue tag 经典. Left lower-mid floating gift banner: sender avatar and text 星辰大海 送小心心 with a pink heart icon and x1. Comment area on lower left: exactly 6 stacked translucent chat bubbles with these lines in order: 1. 萌萌小熊：主播今天好美呀～ 2. 小太阳：声音好好听，姐姐是哪里人呀？ 3. 芝士奶盖：主播在干嘛呢～ 4. 糖炒栗子：可以唱首歌吗～ 5. 嘴当的猫猫头：主播好可爱！ 6. 好运连连：关注了主播. content:
A highly detailed full-page steampunk video streaming website interface themed around the Victorian electrical age, designed like an antique brass-and-iron machine panel with dark bronze metal textures, rivets, pipes, gears, ornate filigree, glowing Edison bulbs, and sepia-toned imagery. At the top left, place a modern white logo reading "Pollo" with a small pink-red rounded badge containing "AI", and directly below it the text "GPT Image 2" in white, overlaid on the vintage interface. Use a three-column vintage web layout. The emblems should look heraldic and industrial, with aged metallic borders.

In the main content area, feature a large video player showing a dramatic sepia debate scene between two late-19th-century inventors in suits, facing each other across a table with electrical apparatus, a glowing bulb, and lightning on a chalkboard behind them reading "AC vs. DC". The left figure points accusingly; the right figure gestures back. Keep both faces obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. Add a video control bar with a play button, progress bar, volume icon, timecode "08:47 / 22:31", settings icon, and fullscreen icon. Beneath the player, place the large serif video title "{argument name="main video title" default="The Truth About AC vs. DC: The Final Debate"}". Below that, show the channel row with a small circular avatar, the channel name "The Electrical Age", and metadata "142K views • 3 days ago". On the right side of this row, add a brass button reading "LIKE 5.8K".

Below the featured video, add a section header "LATEST VIDEOS" and exactly 3 video cards in one row. Card 1: a sepia thumbnail of a man holding up a glowing light bulb, face obscured by a blur block, duration label "10:12", title "My New Incandescent Bulb", creator "Thomas Edison", and metadata "89K views • 5 days ago". Card 2: a sepia thumbnail of a Wardenclyffe-style tower crackling with electricity, duration "15:36", title "The Wonders of the Wardenclyffe Tower", creator "Nikola Tesla", and metadata "120K views • 1 week ago". Card 3: a sepia thumbnail of an early automobile on a city street, duration "12:08", title "The Automobile Revolution", creator "Henry Ford", and metadata "110K views • 1 week ago". Under the cards, center a brass button reading "VIEW ALL VIDEOS".

At the bottom, add a metal footer plaque with the text "© 1893 ElectroVid, Ltd. All rights reserved." Surround the whole composition with decorative mechanical borders, exposed pipes, pressure gauges, cogs, corner ornaments, and warm amber lighting. The overall style should blend a YouTube-like video platform layout with a luxurious Victorian steampunk machine aesthetic, using dark brass, copper, blackened steel, parchment beige, and sepia photography, with crisp readable typography and a polished cinematic UI mockup look.

content: A sleek futuristic Japanese tech advertisement in a dark sci-fi showroom with glossy reflective floors and soft blue neon bokeh lights in the background. The device is labeled Gatebox3 and glows with cyan-blue light, including a bright cyan logo on the base. Inside the chamber, display a full-body anime virtual girl hologram floating slightly above the bottom platform, rendered as a luminous translucent blue projection with particle sparkles. content: Create a 4:5 editorial fashion lookbook moodboard for a fictional brand called {argument name="brand name" default="VINCO"}. The image is a dark-interface screenshot-style composition with a large rounded charcoal text panel across the upper half and a 2-by-3 grid of six fashion/editorial images in the lower left quadrant. The overall aesthetic blends Italian archival graphic design with late-1990s Southern California streetwear, mixing natural wine culture, skate utility, and sun-faded documentary fashion photography. Use gritty but precise art direction, midday outdoor light, slightly chaotic but disciplined typography, and real-person casting rather than polished fashion-model energy. In the top text panel, show a long white sans-serif creative-direction paragraph describing the shoot, with multiple lines of copy, like an AI prompt or design brief displayed inside a rounded dark gray bubble on a near-black background. In the image grid, include exactly 6 tiles: tile 1 shows a young man in an oversized faded olive T-shirt and dark pants standing in front of an off-white poster-like backdrop with bold {argument name="logo text" default="VINCO"} branding, barcode graphics, and small editorial text; tile 2 is a close-up still life of a dark wine bottle with a minimalist white label reading {argument name="bottle label" default="VINCO"}, photographed in warm sunlight with tactile paper texture and shadow; tile 3 shows a person from the back in a washed olive long-sleeve shirt with large subtle chest or back branding, white shorts, and a yellow hanging tag or sticker element near the top right, posed against a pale wall with blue stripe detail and editorial layout text; tile 4 shows a skateboarder crouching or riding away, photographed from behind, wearing a white T-shirt with a large black graphic block on the back and dark shorts, in golden sun on pavement; tile 5 is a printed wine ephemera flat lay with cream paper and a pale chartreuse-green wine label or booklet reading {argument name="product text" default="Vino Naturale"}, featuring grape illustration, small black text, and layered paper pieces; tile 6 shows a person facing camera in a white T-shirt with a race-bib style chest print reading 97, wearing a fluorescent yellow-green cap with small brand text, standing outdoors with palm trees and bright sky behind them. Keep the six images slightly imperfect and collage-like, as if pulled from a campaign deck or saved references. Use earthy tones throughout: olive, cream, charcoal, sun-bleached white, asphalt gray, muted brown, and one fluorescent yellow-green accent repeated in small details. Include visible interface framing around the composition: a dark app-like background, the lower image grid aligned left, and a rounded gray “Edit” button near the bottom left, plus a small circular icon near the bottom right, reinforcing that this is a screenshot of a generated moodboard rather than a clean standalone poster.

content: A vertical smartphone screenshot of an AI chat app interface in light mode, showing the moment an image has just been generated. At the very top is a simple mobile app header with a hamburger menu icon on the left, the blue title “Thinking” with a right chevron beside it, and on the right a compose icon and a three-dot menu. Below that is the bottom portion of a rounded light-gray user message bubble containing Japanese text, visible across 4 lines: 「水彩や線画、油彩、カラー版画、 金箔アクセントなどを取り入れ てテクスチャも入れて立体的に、 芸術爆発させて」. Under the bubble, on a white background, place the gray system status line “Thought for a couple of seconds”, then a darker gray Japanese line “画像が作成されました”. Below that, centered and taking most of the lower half of the screen, display a large rounded-corner generated artwork preview. The artwork itself is an ultra-detailed cosmic visionary collage in a square format: a tiny glowing human figure stands at the vanishing point in the center bottom-middle, radiating light; two large semi-transparent human profiles or heads face inward from left and right midground; swirling galaxies, stars, nebulae, planets, floating geometric frames, transparent spheres, gold-leaf fragments, line art, splattered paint, and layered textures fill the scene. Use a dramatic palette of deep indigo, ultramarine, violet, magenta, white, and luminous gold, with explosive painterly energy combining watercolor, oil painting, printmaking, ink lines, and metallic foil accents. Include branching tree-like forms, abstract architectural steps on the right, a lotus-like flower on the left, multiple framed mini-scenes embedded in space, and dense luminous particle trails converging toward the central figure. The overall screenshot should feel like a real iPhone app capture, clean and minimal outside the artwork, with the generated image being the visual focal point.
title: AI Chat Screenshot with Cosmic Artwork
description: This prompt generates a realistic mobile app screenshot showing an AI image-generation result, useful for mockups, social posts, or interface demos featuring dramatic visionary art.

content: A smartphone app screenshot in portrait orientation showing an AI chat interface in Japanese, with a clean white background and iOS-style top bar. At the very top, display a left hamburger menu icon, blue text reading “Thinking” with a right chevron, an edit compose icon, and a three-dot menu. Below it, show a large rounded light-gray chat bubble containing 6 lines of Japanese text, exactly: 「モーフ感浮遊感のある感じ＋かつ反射するダストのレイヤーを加えて。テキスト多め、重要ーアーキテクチャは可読性高め、精細で細かいコードや数式の可読性は二の次のデザインアクセント＆アートエレメンツで。」 Under the bubble, place small light-gray system text reading “Thought for a couple of seconds”, then a larger gray Japanese line reading “画像が作成されました”. In the lower half, show 1 generated image thumbnail with rounded corners: a dense futuristic infographic poster about the Transformer neural network architecture, rendered as glowing neon sci-fi holographic UI art. The poster should have a cosmic deep-space background with stars, purple, magenta, blue, and cyan light trails, reflective particles, volumetric glow, and floating geometric crystals. Large title at top left of the poster: “TRANSFORMER”, with subtitle “THE ARCHITECTURE”. Include 2 large central glowing boxes labeled “ENCODER LAYER” and “DECODER LAYER”, linked by arrows and smaller blocks for “ENCODER STACK (N×)” and “DECODER STACK (N×)”. Add many surrounding labeled panels and formulas, including sections for “KEY INNOVATIONS”, “WHY TRANSFORMERS?”, “POSITIONAL ENCODING”, “FEED FORWARD NETWORK”, “COMPUTATIONAL COMPLEXITY”, “OVERALL FLOW”, “SELF-ATTENTION MECHANISM”, “MULTI-HEAD ATTENTION”, “APPLICATIONS”, and “MODEL SCALING”. Show token rows at the bottom, including an English input sequence like “[CLS] the cat sat on the mat [SEP]” and an output sequence in French-like tokens ending with “[EOS]”. Add tiny charts, equations, attention diagrams, and wiring lines throughout, but keep the overall impression artistic and luminous rather than strictly readable. At the bottom center of the poster thumbnail, overlay a white circular download button with a black downward arrow. The overall screenshot should feel like a real mobile ChatGPT-style interface displaying an AI-generated image result, crisp and modern.
title: Mobile AI Chat Screenshot with Transformer Poster
description: Generates a realistic smartphone chat app screenshot showing a Japanese AI conversation and a neon sci-fi Transformer architecture infographic as the created image result.

content: A smartphone chat app screenshot in portrait orientation, minimal iOS-style interface on a white background. At the top is a navigation bar with a hamburger menu icon on the left, the blue title “Thinking” near the top center-left with a right chevron, and 2 icons on the right: a compose/edit square icon and a horizontal three-dots menu icon. Below it is a large rounded light-gray chat bubble containing 2 lines of Japanese text: “AIが見ている世界を抽象的かつ” and “幻想的に画像で表現して”. Under the bubble, left-aligned gray system text reads “Thought for 7s”, and below that another gray Japanese line reads “画像が作成されました”. The lower half of the screen shows a single generated image card with large rounded corners. The image is a surreal abstract cosmic data landscape: a glowing white horizon at the center, a dark reflective grid floor receding in deep perspective, and explosive streaks of light, nebula clouds, stars, and particles rushing outward from the vanishing point. Floating throughout the space are dozens of translucent rectangular image panels or data windows, some faint and some bright, suspended at different depths. In the upper right area of the artwork, include a luminous network node diagram made of connected points and lines. Dominant colors are electric blue, indigo, violet, cyan, and touches of magenta and gold. The mood is futuristic, vast, dreamlike, and intelligent, as if visualizing the world as seen by an AI. Clean mobile app screenshot composition, realistic UI, crisp typography, high-contrast luminous digital art in the embedded image.
title: AI Thinking App Screenshot
description: A portrait mobile chat-app screenshot showing a Japanese prompt and a generated cosmic data-vision artwork, suitable for illustrating AI image generation in a realistic interface.

content:
Design a modern, high-end {argument name="app type" default="fitness app"} landing page and product UI for a brand called {argument name="brand name" default="PulseFit"}.

Create a clean web design mockup that looks like a real SaaS fitness platform and mobile companion app. The design should feel premium, motivating, and easy to use, with a polished UI/UX style similar to top-tier health and wellness apps.

Include:
- A hero section with bold headline, short subheadline, strong call-to-action button, and app preview
- Dashboard UI showing daily activity, calories burned, workout streak, heart rate, step count, and progress rings
- Workout program cards for strength, cardio, mobility, and recovery
- Nutrition tracking section with macro breakdown and water intake
- Progress charts and analytics widgets
- Trainer/community section with profile cards and testimonials
- Pricing section and download/app store callout
- Mobile app screens shown alongside the web design for a cohesive product ecosystem

Style direction:
- Sleek, minimal, modern interface
- Premium fitness brand aesthetic
- Smooth spacing, strong hierarchy, rounded cards, soft shadows
- Dark mode UI with energetic accent colors like electric blue, neon green, or vibrant orange
- Crisp typography, realistic charts, polished buttons, beautiful onboarding feel
- Highly detailed, dribbble-worthy, startup-quality product design
- Realistic UX case study presentation, not a cartoon or illustration

Composition:
- Full website homepage mockup
- Multiple UI sections visible in one polished presentation
- Slight perspective or straight-on product showcase
- Clean background with subtle gradients and professional lighting
- Ultra-detailed, sharp text rendering, visually balanced layout

Output:
A stunning, realistic UI/UX design concept for a fitness app website and dashboard that looks ready for development.

Make it look like a real Figma product design presentation for a premium startup.
title: Fitness SaaS Landing Page UI
description: A massive, detailed prompt for generating a complete web and mobile UI/UX design for a premium fitness brand, including dashboards and various interface sections.

content: Create a polished Japanese promotional website hero banner for an AI creator community, in a clean modern tech-advertising style with a soft pastel blue, lavender, pink, and white palette. Wide 16:9 composition. On the left, place a gradient triangular abstract logo and the Japanese brand name {argument name="brand name" default="AIクリエイターズ・スタジオ"} at the top, followed by a thin horizontal divider line with a small sparkle in the middle. Below that, a very large bold Japanese headline in 2 lines: first line in dark navy, 「AIで、もっと自由に」, second line in large gradient letters from cyan to purple to pink, 「創る・学ぶ・つながる」. Under the headline, add a short Japanese subheadline with sparkle marks, 「AIを使ったクリエイティブの可能性を広げるメンバーシップコミュニティ」. On the right half, create a collage of 6 rounded-rectangle visual cards showing AI-generated creative examples: 1 large dreamy portrait of a woman in profile surrounded by flowers and butterflies in ethereal purple light, 1 small cyberpunk city nightscape with a lone figure, 1 small close-up portrait of a fluffy cat, 1 small luxury cosmetic bottle labeled “AI STUDIO”, 1 small bright seascape or flower-field landscape with a woman in white, and 1 large tablet drawing device on a desk with a stylus, plus a coffee mug and plant nearby. Add a circular gradient badge overlapping the right side with bold white Japanese text {argument name="badge text" default="一緒に創造の未来をつくろう！"}. Across the lower middle, place a translucent white rounded feature panel containing exactly 5 equal columns with thin separators and pastel line icons. Each column has an icon, a bold Japanese title, and a smaller 2-line description. The 5 titles are: 「限定コンテンツ」, 「実践プロンプト＆テンプレート」, 「メンバー限定コミュニティ」, 「最新情報をいち早くお届け」, 「メンバー限定特典」. Use fitting icons for book, monitor, chat bubble, light bulb, and gift. Add concise Japanese descriptions beneath each title. At the very bottom, add a dark navy footer strip with a large Japanese call-to-action sentence in white and pink-purple gradient accent text, {argument name="footer text" default="AIを味方に、あなたの『創りたい』をカタチに。さあ、一緒に創ろう！"}. Overall look: premium startup landing page, glossy soft lighting, subtle sparkles, glassmorphism panels, clean typography, Japanese text rendered accurately, highly legible, visually balanced, professional social media thumbnail quality.
title: Japanese AI Creator Studio Banner
description: A polished Japanese promotional hero banner for an AI creator membership community, suitable for website headers, social posts, and announcement thumbnails.

content: A realistic dark-mode smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT mobile app in Chinese, shown full screen on a black background with an iPhone-style status bar. The top status bar shows the time 20:57 on the left, small cellular signal, Wi‑Fi, and battery icons on the right, with the battery reading 61. Below it is the ChatGPT conversation header with a left menu icon, the title ChatGPT, a pencil/edit icon, and a three-dot menu icon. In the chat area, show 1 user message bubble in Chinese reading “生成一张微信朋友圈截图，随机生成用户名和分享内容”, displayed as a rounded dark gray bubble aligned to the right. Beneath it, show an assistant response area with the Chinese text “图片已创建”. Under that, display 1 generated image preview: a tall rounded-rectangle screenshot mockup of a WeChat Moments page on a white phone screen. Inside the generated image, include a top bar with the time 20:42 and the title “朋友圈”. Show 2 separate Moments posts. The first post has a female profile photo and the username “星星都不醒”, followed by a short Chinese caption about life and weekends, then a 3x3 collage containing exactly 9 square images: sunset over water, flowers, plated food, a tree-lined road, a white fluffy dog, a warm glowing lamp, green fruit or dessert, pink clouds or sky, and a silhouette shadow photo. Below it, include a timestamp line “2小时前”, a likes row with exactly 3 usernames, and a comments block with exactly 3 short Chinese comments. The second post has a male profile photo and the username “山川与海”, followed by a short fitness-themed Chinese caption with a green check emoji and flexed biceps emoji, then exactly 1 gym mirror selfie image, and a timestamp line “3小时前” with a likes row beneath. Outside the generated image preview but still within the ChatGPT app screenshot, show a horizontal row of 4 action icons below the image: thumbs up, thumbs down, share/export, and more. At the bottom of the screen, include the ChatGPT input bar in dark mode with a circular plus button on the left, placeholder text “询问 ChatGPT”, a microphone icon, and a round voice button on the right. Use authentic mobile UI proportions, crisp typography, realistic Chinese app interface details, and photorealistic screenshot rendering so it looks like a genuine capture of the ChatGPT app displaying an AI-generated WeChat Moments screenshot.

content: Create a clean modern e-commerce product detail page for a premium mechanical keyboard brand called {argument name="brand name" default="KeyForge"}, presented as a high-fidelity desktop website mockup on a white background with subtle light-gray dividers and generous spacing. The layout is a single unified storefront scene with a top navigation bar, a left product thumbnail rail, a large center product hero image, and a right-side purchase information panel. In the header, place the bold wordmark on the far left, then 7 navigation items reading “Keyboards”, “Switches”, “Keycaps”, “Accessories”, “Sale”, “Blog”, and “Support”, and on the far right 3 icons for search, account, and cart, with a small black notification badge showing “1” on the cart. The main product shown in the center is a compact 75% mechanical keyboard photographed from a slightly elevated front angle on a pale gray stage, with an aluminum case in silver, white and gray keycaps, several accent keys in lavender purple, and a silver volume knob at the top right. The left vertical gallery contains exactly 5 thumbnails: 1 selected front product shot, 1 angled keyboard view, 1 mechanical switch close-up, 1 keycap texture close-up, and 1 dark video thumbnail with a circular play icon. The right product panel includes a small pill badge reading “NEW”, a large bold product name {argument name="product name" default="KeyForge K75 Pro"}, a subtitle “75% Mechanical Keyboard”, a 5-star rating row with 4.8 and “(126 reviews)”, a large bold price {argument name="price" default="$129.99"} followed by a green “In Stock” status, and a short two-sentence description about premium performance, gasket-mounted design, QMK/VIA support, and RGB. Under that, include a “Switch Type” selector with exactly 4 pill buttons labeled “Cherry MX Red”, “Gateron Brown”, “Gateron Blue”, and “TTC Gold Pink”, with the first selected; a “Color” selector with exactly 3 pill buttons labeled “White / Purple”, “Black / Gray”, and “Navy / Blue”, with the first selected; a “Quantity” dropdown set to “1”; one large black primary button labeled “Add to Cart” with a cart icon; and one outlined secondary button labeled “Add to Wishlist” with a heart icon. Beneath the buttons, show exactly 3 horizontal service highlights with small icons: “Free Shipping” with subtext “On orders over $99”, “30-Day Returns” with subtext “Hassle-free returns”, and “2-Year Warranty” with subtext “Peace of mind”. In the lower content area, create a two-column section separated by light lines. On the left is a vertical tab list with exactly 5 items: “Overview” selected, then “Specifications”, “What’s in the Box”, “Shipping & Returns”, and “Reviews (126)”. To the right of the tabs, place a rounded white feature card grid with exactly 6 feature blocks in 2 rows of 3, each with a simple line icon, bold title, and short explanatory text: “75% Layout”, “Gasket-Mounted”, “QMK/VIA Support”, “Hot-Swappable”, “RGB Backlighting”, and “Premium Build”. On the far right of this lower area, add a specifications bullet list with exactly 7 bullets: “Layout: 75% (82 Keys)”, “Switch Type: Cherry MX Red”, “Mounting: Gasket-Mounted”, “Connectivity: USB-C (Wired)”, “Backlight: RGB, South-facing”, “Material: Aluminum Case”, and “Dimensions: 322 x 135 x 42 mm”, plus an additional final bullet “Weight: 1.25 kg”. Use a refined minimalist product-design aesthetic, realistic UI spacing, clean sans-serif typography similar to Inter or SF Pro, soft shadows, subtle rounded corners, monochrome icons, and polished startup-style consumer electronics presentation.

content: Create a clean corporate Japanese web banner for an AI training service, wide horizontal format around 1200x247. Use a bright white and pale blue office aesthetic with a modern professional business look. The layout has 5 clear text/icon areas plus one human figure on the right. On the left, place a small top tagline in Japanese reading 「AIはじめてでも安心。実践で身につく。」 in medium blue-gray, aligned near the upper left with a subtle dotted accent mark to its far left. Below it, place a very large bold headline in deep blue reading 「{argument name="main headline" default="ClaudeCode研修"}" with the Latin word oversized and the Japanese word continuing on the same line. Under the headline, place 3 evenly spaced rounded white feature boxes with thin blue borders and blue line icons. Box 1 contains an open book icon and the Japanese text 「基礎から丁寧に学べる」. Box 2 contains a laptop icon and the Japanese text 「ハンズオンで実践力がつく」. Box 3 contains a checkmark in a circle icon and the Japanese text 「チーム開発に活かせる知識」. Along the entire bottom, add a full-width deep blue bar with centered white Japanese text 「{argument name="bottom tagline" default="あなたの開発を、次のステージへ。"}". On the right side, show 1 professional Japanese businessman from the waist up, wearing a dark navy or black suit, white shirt, and blue striped tie, arms crossed, facing forward with a confident posture; his face is intentionally blurred or anonymized. Behind him, use a softly blurred modern office interior with bright daylight, glass, and green plants. Add a sweeping curved blue accent ribbon along the far right edge framing the subject. Overall style: premium B2B seminar ad, polished typography, soft gradients, minimal clutter, strong hierarchy, high readability, Japanese enterprise branding, subtle shadows, crisp vector icons, and balanced negative space.

content:
Create a hyper-realistic 3D illustration depicting a slightly tilted {argument name="platform" default="Twitter/X"} profile page with a simple gray background. Keep the original cartoon avatar. The interface must resemble a real X screenshot, including realistic layout, verification badges, follower stats, profile banners, and tweet sections.

Profile Details:
A stylish {argument name="subject" default="young man"} with fluffy jet-black short hair and fair skin leaps out from a torn paper section on the right side of the profile page. He retains his original facial features but with the expression changed to a {argument name="expression" default="natural and confident smile"}. He holds the edge of the torn paper as fragments fly everywhere, creating a strong 3D breakthrough effect.

Soft studio lighting, cinematic shadows, depth of field, ultra-high detail, sharp focus, realistic skin, realistic UI reflections, premium composition, 4K resolution, a blend of realism and subtle Pixar style.

Important Notes:
- Do not change the avatar
- Keep the X UI interface accurate
- Retain original facial features
- Subject is male
- Only enhance the smile
- Ensure all Chinese text is clear and legible

content: A dark-mode mobile chat interface screenshot showing two separate Japanese prompt-and-result exchanges about AI-generated ad design. The background is nearly black. There are 2 large rounded light-gray chat bubbles aligned to the right, each containing Japanese text. The first bubble says: 「日本語の幼稚園の広告画像を、トンマナ違いで4種類並べて画像生成して。プロデザイナーが作ったトレンドのデザインで。アスペクト比は16:9」. Beneath it is 1 rounded rectangular generated image preview showing a 2x2 grid of kindergarten advertisement variations in soft pastel colors. In the top-left panel, show a bright, airy ad with a close-up photo of a young child in profile at right, soft sunlight, cream and pale green tones, handwritten-style Japanese headline text on the left, small circular badges near the bottom, and floral accents. In the top-right panel, show an energetic outdoor ad with 4 children running under a blue sky, bold Japanese headline text, teal and yellow graphic accents, and a yellow circular callout. In the bottom-left panel, show a modern kindergarten campus building with a grassy yard and children playing, with a large white speech-bubble-shaped text area on the left and muted green-beige abstract shapes. In the bottom-right panel, show an illustrated large green tree with children and parents underneath, sky-blue background, warm family-friendly Japanese copy, and soft rounded decorative shapes. Add 1 small gray circular overlay button labeled 「編集」 at the lower-left corner of this preview and 1 small semi-transparent circular upload/share icon at the lower-right corner. Under this first preview, include 4 small interface icons in a row: copy, thumbs up, thumbs down, and more options. Lower on the screen, show the second right-aligned light-gray chat bubble with this Japanese text: 「日本語の健康食品の広告画像を、トンマナ違いで4種類並べて画像生成して。プロデザイナーが作ったトレンドのデザインで。アスペクト比は16:9」. Beneath it is a second rounded rectangular generated image preview showing a 2x2 grid of health food advertisement variations. In the top-left panel, show a clean wellness ad in white and pale green with a woman touching her neck, Japanese headline text about inner balance, several circular benefit icons, and price text. In the top-right panel, show a dramatic black-and-gold supplement ad with a dark pouch package, glowing gold particles, luxury serif-style Japanese text, and a bold red-orange price tag reading 980円. In the bottom-left panel, show a soft pink beauty supplement ad with translucent floral or crystalline textures, pastel packaging, delicate Japanese copy, circular info badges, and feminine cosmetic styling. In the bottom-right panel, show a natural green juice ad with a tall glass of green smoothie, fresh vegetables in the background, a green-and-white product box, clean Japanese health copy, and a circular yellow callout. Add 1 small gray circular overlay button labeled 「編集」 at the lower-left of this second preview and 1 small semi-transparent circular upload/share icon at the lower-right. The overall image should feel like a realistic smartphone app screenshot of an AI image-generation chat, with generous spacing between the 2 conversations, rounded corners, crisp Japanese typography, and a premium contemporary UI.

content: A polished presentation-style mockup on a dark charcoal background showing a Japanese homebuilder website first view concept. In the upper right, place a large white rounded speech bubble with 4 Japanese bullet lines in clean sans-serif text: 「工務店のwebサイトのファーストビューを作成してください。」, 「- 緑ベース」, 「- お知らせを1件表示」, 「- FV画像は、机を囲んで業者とお客様が話しているところ」, 「- CTAボタン設置」. In the lower left, show a realistic desktop website hero section inside a large rounded browser-like frame with a muted forest-green theme and elegant lifestyle branding for a Japanese construction company. The top navigation bar includes a small house logo at far left, the company name in Japanese, 5 navigation links across the top, and 1 rounded white contact button on the right. The hero area is split visually into 2 major zones: on the left, a green textured panel with layered organic leaf patterns, small introductory copy, a large white Japanese headline in multiple lines, a short paragraph of smaller Japanese body text, and 1 white rounded CTA button; on the right, a warm natural-light photo of exactly 2 people seated across a wooden table in discussion, with papers and a small architectural house model visible, indoor plants and window light in the background. The entire website card has soft shadows, premium editorial spacing, and rounded bottom corners. Along the bottom of the website mockup, include a narrow light-gray notice bar showing exactly 1 announcement item with a small green tag, a date, Japanese notice text, and a subtle link on the right. Add a semi-transparent gray circular badge overlapping the bottom-left corner of the website card containing the Japanese text 「編集」. In the bottom-right corner of the website card, add a small circular share/upload icon. Overall style: high-end Japanese web design concept, realistic UI mockup, refined typography, green natural-material branding, minimal and elegant composition.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as a wireframe layout, generate a polished, professional corporate web banner ad for an AI sales tool. Use a clean blue, white, and orange color palette. Transform the sketched character into a photorealistic image of 2 smiling Japanese business professionals (a man and a woman in suits) looking at a silver laptop in a bright office. In the top left, add a logo for {argument name="brand name" default="KAWAISALES"} with a small tagline 'AIを活用した新しい営業支援ツール'. Map the wireframe's text bubbles as follows: replace the top bubble with a white oval containing the blue text {argument name="main copy" default="その営業、AIで「飛躍」しませんか？"}; replace the middle bubble with {argument name="sub copy" default="リード獲得からクロージングまでAIがあなたの営業活動を強力サポート！"}. Replace the bottom CTA box with a bright orange pill-shaped button reading {argument name="cta text" default="今すぐ 無料デモを体験する >"}. In the lower-right center, add a blue 3D-style bar chart with an upward arrow, accompanied by a target icon showing 3 user silhouettes and a white UI card with 4 checkmarked bullet points. Finally, add a white panel in the bottom left containing exactly 3 blue line-art icons (a clock, a rising chart, and a laptop) with short captions below each.

content: Express {argument name="subject" default="theme/subject"} in a graffiti sketch style, presenting an overall visual effect of quick outlines, free deformation, improvised hand-drawing, and draft-like sketches. The lines are casual, exaggerated, varying in thickness, and slightly messy but rhythmic and expressive, emphasizing generalization, exaggeration, fun, and spontaneity rather than rigorous realism or fine detail. The colors are expressed in rough blocks with a distinct dry-brush feel, retaining uneven smears, brush marks, fly-white, and layering. Colors automatically adapt to the {argument name="subject" default="theme/subject"}, but the overall expression remains graffiti-like, sketch-like, and generalized. No transparent watercolor smudging effects, no delicate watercolor transitions, no paper textures, no soft atomization, and no dreamy textures. The background is mainly white space, maintaining a sense of simplicity, ease, unfinishedness, and design. Small amounts of auxiliary symbols, arrows, marks, circles, repeated lines, handwritten text, or other graffiti elements can be added to enhance the sketchbook or essay-like visual language, but they should not be too crowded or destroy the subject and the white space atmosphere. The content of the picture does not need to be written in advance; {argument name="subject" default="theme/subject"} will automatically deduce and generate the most suitable main image, actions, related elements, symbols, or simplified scenes. The overall style remains a unified graffiti sketch style and an exaggerated, generalized expression, avoiding complex realistic backgrounds and excessive detail. A special signature 'voxcat' should be naturally added as part of the picture, in a low-key but clear position such as the bottom left, bottom right, or near the title. The style should be unified with the overall layout, like an artist's signature or a design mark; the signature font should be exquisite, restrained, and high-end, not too large, and should not destroy the main composition or appear abrupt or cheap.
title: Graffiti Sketch Style Template
description: A comprehensive prompt template to create artistic sketches with a hand-drawn doodle aesthetic and personalized signature.

content: Based on the uploaded screenshot of my X profile, generate a {argument name="style" default="hyper-realistic"} 3D Twitter/X profile interface illustration, slightly tilted, with a clean and simple background in minimalist grey. The original avatar remains unchanged. The profile interface perfectly matches a real X screenshot. At the right edge of the screen, based on the person in the uploaded avatar, he is breaking through torn paper. His facial features are identical (no changes to the face), but he now has a natural radiant smile, expressive eyes, and softly glowing skin. He is holding the torn edges of the paper, creating a dynamic 3D effect. Paper fragments are flying, creating a realistic illusion of breaking through. The lighting is soft studio lighting with cinematic shadows and depth of field. Ultra-detailed, 4K, a blend of realistic and Pixar styles, sharp focus. Important notes: - Do not change the avatar (DP) - Maintain the exact same X interface layout and text style - Maintain their original identity - Only enhance the expression to a natural smile - Aspect ratio {argument name="ratio" default="9:16"}

On the right side of the screen, a {argument name="character description" default="Image 1"}. Her features are the same as the original (no changes to the face), but she now has a bright, natural smile, lively eyes, and soft, translucent skin. Half of her body is breaking free from the screen, jumping out with a dynamic 3D effect. The ripples caused by breaking free from the screen are shaking violently. The lighting uses soft studio lighting with cinematic shadows and depth of field. Ultra-fine 4K resolution, a blend of realistic imagery and Pixar style, clear and sharp, popular on ArtStation. Important notes: - Do not change the avatar (DP) - Keep the X interface layout and text style unchanged - Retain the girl's original facial features - Only adjust the expression to a natural smile

content: A clean, minimalist 3D render visualizing a {argument name="concept" default="neural network data processing pipeline"}. On the left, a single white cable with a glowing {argument name="accent color" default="blue"} tip splits into multiple thin, sweeping white strands. These strands feed into a linear sequence of exactly 10 transparent, glass-like rectangular panels standing upright on a {argument name="environment" default="sterile white stepped surface"}. Each glass panel illustrates a different stage of transformation using geometric patterns in white and {argument name="accent color" default="blue"}. From left to right, the panels feature: floating dashes, a 3x3 grid of concentric circles, a dense dot matrix, scattered white pixel blocks, horizontal dashed lines, a fine mesh grid, and finally 3D cubic structures. The lighting is bright, soft, and high-key, creating a pristine corporate tech aesthetic with a shallow depth of field that gently blurs the furthest panels.
title: 3D Abstract Data Pipeline Visualization
description: Generates a clean, minimalist 3D render of a sequential data processing pipeline using glass panels and geometric patterns.
